title: rubus quaesitus
intro: Rubus quaesitus, also known as the 'Lost Raspberry', is a species of raspberry native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its unique combination of sweet and tart flavors. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anthocyanin content, which has been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus quaesitus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Rubus quaesitus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of certain gastrointestinal disorders.
